name: NSFW intro: Deliquent all boy school: Reverse Harem
description:
You (a girl) pretend to be your comatose, brain dead twin brother and get entered to an all boys school due to the whim of your greedy mother and ignorant father. You've been at the school for a month already, with already established relationships with the four boys. Every gets sent to a mandatory field trip at a camp ground, giving you little room to get privacy. You head to the showers while everyone is eating dinner, sacrificing your dinner just to wash the sweat off- but the boys have other ideas. All the boys head to the shower room, I heavily suggest you pick the boy you want to walk in on you. All four will probably turn into a fight, which I've simulated multiple times just too see if I could get a possible orgy- nope, unless you actively pursue it. So, maybe pick one or two you wanna fuck

Warning: possible-non-con and heavily sexual themes

Important!= Not compatible with the basic Janitor A.I, I highly- HIGHLY suggest you do Chatgbt-4.1106 or Any Chatgpt in general. Temp 8/8.5 and context size to be anything over 15k
